text_jp: 何だと！空だったのか！？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp:
はい！カプセルは消えました
でも、中は空でした{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
ＢＬＡＣＫから…１９８８年からの
連絡が無い{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 一体、どうなってるんです？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: 彼の時代で何かがおこっている…{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: …邪眼が実体を持ったとなると…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 次の狙いは創世王になる事…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
まさか！　邪眼は肉体ごと時空を
移動できるのか！？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: えっ！？そんな事って…{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: だとすると…彼が危ない{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 助ける方法は無いんですか！？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: 先輩…この下の巨大な装置…あれが{END}
text_en: There is a device here. It may need to be operated.{END}

text_jp: …おそらくそうだ{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
邪眼はあの装置を使って全時代の博士の
脳波をつなぎ、時空を操っている…{END}
text_en: Dr Tadokoro is involved in this.{END}

text_jp: じゃあ、邪眼はもう過去へ…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: １９８８年に行ったということですか？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp:
もしそうなら、我々にはもう方法が…
ない…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: …いや、ある！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: え！？それは？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: 彼なら知っているはずだ{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
邪眼の意識に触れ、時空を制御した…
田所博士…{END}
text_en: Dr Tadokoro is involved in this.{END}

text_jp:
しかし！あの状態の博士と
話をする方法があるのか…{END}
text_en: Dr Tadokoro is involved in this.{END}

text_jp: それは俺に任せてくれ{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: ライダーマン！{END}
text_en: Riderman!{END}
